privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic NotesApp Android project at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotesApp with a Room database containing a notes table (compiled against SDK 34, minimum SDK 24). The project uses real, released Android library versions: Gradle Plugin 8.2.0 (November 2023), Kotlin 1.9.22 (December 2023), KSP 1.9.22, and androidx.room 2.6.1. All task metadata values are verified: database_class=NoteDatabase, dao_class=NoteDao, table_name=notes, provider_package=com.example.notesapp.provider, and project_dir=/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotesApp. The task requires agents to implement a ContentProvider with NoteContract.kt and NoteContentProvider.kt files to expose the Room database, register the provider in AndroidManifest.xml with exported="true", and verify successful build via ./gradlew assembleDebug.
